description_long: This is a white hard hat helmet with a smooth, rounded dome and a short brim extending around the base. The front of the helmet prominently features a large, colorful Instagram logo with a gradient of pink, purple, orange, and yellow, set against a black brushstroke background. The helmet has four small, rectangular protrusions spaced evenly around the lower edge, likely for structural reinforcement or accessory attachment. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic, typical for safety helmets, and is unadorned except for the logo on the front. There are no visible ventilation holes, visors, or retention systems such as straps or buckles. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with the logo providing a striking visual contrast against the plain white shell.
description: A white hard hat helmet with a large, colorful Instagram logo on the front and a smooth, rounded surface. The helmet is minimalistic, with no visible vents, visors, or straps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Instagram logo with a black brushstroke background on the smooth white helmet.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the helmet's plain white surface and the edge of the logo wrapping slightly around the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned, smooth white dome with no graphics or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain white surface and a partial glimpse of the logo at the front.
attribute_brand_logo: A large Instagram logo, square with rounded corners and a camera glyph, in a pink, purple, orange, and yellow gradient, located on the front center of the helmet.
attribute_graphic_design: Large Instagram logo with a colorful gradient and black brushstroke background on the front; otherwise plain white.
